tasks.label: ⚡ 快速部署 (有改代碼用)
tasks.command: gradlew.bat installDebug && adb shell monkey -p com.example.myapplication -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1

tasks.label: 🚀 僅重啟 App (沒改代碼用)
tasks.command: adb shell am force-stop com.example.myapplication; adb shell monkey -p com.example.myapplication -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1
